Opus's question poses a false binary; the mandatory next move is to profile the unexplained 1.8x compose slowdown on the already-safe path.

Therefore the deep-path measurement IS the top of the constrained benchmark: full coverage + faithful + agentic + no deadlock + no degrade, with guard (15/15) and grace (3/3, plus a real in-run wall-hit that stayed agentic) both live-green.
